title: Mantis Telegram Desktop Proof
summary: Mantis could not start native Telegram Desktop proof because the shared Telegram user credential pool was exhausted after Crabbox provider fallback.

baseline.expected: baseline native Telegram Desktop proof captured
baseline.error: Telegram credential broker returned POOL_EXHAUSTED before baseline session start.

candidate.expected: candidate native Telegram Desktop proof captured
candidate.error: Candidate session was not started because the shared Telegram user credential was unavailable.
